title: Azerbaijan Advances National Hydrogen Strategy Implementation with DNV
content: A meeting was held at Azerbaijanâ€™s Ministry of Energy to advance the application of the National Hydrogen Strategy, featuring the Working Group and representatives from DNV Energy Systems Germany GmbH. Deputy Energy Minister Elnur Soltanov emphasized the country's significant potential for cleaner fuel production. Following the presentation of the "National Strategic Vision" at COP29, developed with support from the European Bank for Reconstruction and Development (EBRD), DNV was announced as the winner of the tender for the project's second phase. DNV is now tasked with preparing the strategy's implementation plan, expected to be ready in the first half of 2026. During the meeting, DNV presented on strategy application, leading to discussions on legal frameworks and priority areas. The Working Group subsequently agreed on specific targets and tasks to accelerate the development of Azerbaijan's hydrogen sector.
author: Analysts Account
source: Ministry of Energy, The Republic of Azerbaijan
